title: Cobblemon Nuzlocke
description:
Cobblemon Nuzlocke allows for an easier time to do a version of a Pokemon Nuzlocke but using the Cobblemon mod.
This datapack requires Cobblemon and Radical Cobblemon Trainers mods to work.
body: This Minecraft Datapack makes running a Cobblemon Nuzlocke a breeze. The Datapack will randomly generate a new pokemon each time the trainer enters a new undiscorvered biome. The pokemons level is randomized based on the trainers max pokemon level. Which increases as the trainer get gym badges. It also randomized the starter pokemon and gives the trainer some begginer items for the challenge. Do you have what it takes?
